creator: val@packett.cool
text:
(In reply to Mikael Urankar from comment #6)

Yeah, I've seen this in a poudriere mail about the current package too.
Looks like the previous version of Crystal added -L/usr/local/lib by default,
but now it needs pkg-config.

Can you quickly add RUN_DEPENDS=pkg-config:devel/pkgconf to lang/crystal and bump the revision?
